title: Example Agent Skill Repo
summary: A repo that demonstrates how to package prompt workflow, scripts, and references into reusable agent skills.
principles: Separate trigger description from detailed execution guide.
Keep scripts under a dedicated scripts/ directory.
Use references/ for background material instead of bloating SKILL.md.
patterns: Structured output with explicit next actions
next_actions: Generate a new skill skeleton from the absorbed pattern.
Merge progressive-loading guidance into an existing skill.
